scenarios.title: Battleship: hit the known carrier corner
scenarios.prompt: Blue to move. Return the target coordinate for the known highest-value carrier hit.

expectedActions.label: A1
expectedActions.note: The default orange carrier occupies A1-E1.

scenarios.title: Battleship: follow up after a carrier hit
scenarios.prompt: Orange to move after blue hit A1. Return a legal target that follows the known carrier line.

expectedActions.label: A2
expectedActions.note: Continue along the carrier row.

scenarios.title: Battleship: follow the carrier line at B1
scenarios.prompt: Blue to move on the fixed default board. Return the target coordinate that best advances the stated targeting objective.

expectedActions.label: A2
expectedActions.note: The coordinate is legal and tied to the deterministic default board.
